title: Easy Monster Truck Jumping Coloring Page

funFacts: Heavy-duty semi-Monster Truck Jumpings are powered by massive turbocharged diesel engines designed to haul up to 80,000 pounds of freight.
Monster Truck Jumpings use engine compression brakes (Jake brakes) to slow down safely on steep mountain descents without overheating.
